title: Climate transition upside
question: How can we benefit from the transition to climate neutrality and low-emission solutions?
guidance: Use climate metrics to position the venture as part of the low-carbon transition, highlight CO₂ reduction in pitches and tenders, and explore green funding or climate-tech partnerships.

title: Water stewardship upside
question: Can we gain image benefits from water-saving processes?
guidance: Show water-efficient processes clearly, use simple water metrics, and integrate responsible water use into the ESG roadmap and external communication.

title: Biodiversity reputation upside
question: Can biodiversity action improve our reputation?
guidance: Communicate certified sourcing and visible nature-positive actions, and connect those steps to trust, ESG storytelling, and brand differentiation.

title: Circular economy upside
question: Can circular practices strengthen our brand and efficiency?
guidance: Make circular features explicit, track circularity KPIs, and use recycled materials, reuse loops, or repairability as both a cost and brand differentiator.

title: Community investment upside
question: Do we use community investment to improve our reputation?
guidance: Build partnerships that create local value, share success stories, and connect community engagement to reputation, trust, and long-term market access.

title: Governance and consumer trust upside
question: How can stronger governance (clear product claims, data/privacy-by-design, accessible T&Cs) build consumer trust and unlock preferred partner status or premium pricing?
guidance: Present transparent claims, simple onboarding, accessible terms, and strong data practices so governance becomes a trust and procurement advantage rather than only a control layer.
